definitions.gloss_en: a unit's capacity to resist or absorb attacks; a defensive stat or action
definitions.gloss_jp: {ユニット|ゆにっと}の{攻|こう}{撃|げき}への{耐|たい}{性|せい}；{防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}{的|てき}な{能|のう}{力|りょく}や{行|こう}{動|どう}
definitions.explanation_en: Either a defensive stat on a unit's profile, or the general concept of withstanding enemy attacks. May appear as a stat abbreviation (防) in datasheets.
definitions.implicit_notes: 防御 is the universal Japanese game and military term for defense. WH Japan abbreviates it as 防 on stat sheets, but the full word is entirely generic.
definitions.orthography_notes: 防御: 防 (prevent/defend) + 御 (control/ward off). Standard Japanese military and game term. Goo dictionary entry is general. JWC glossary attests 防御. Not WH-specific.
definitions.game_setting_notes: Universal across all Japanese game genres. In miniature wargames, may be a numeric stat (防御値) or a saving throw modifier. Contrasts with 攻撃力 (attack power).

usage_jp: {防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}ステータス (defense stat); {防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}する (to defend); {防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}{値|ち} (defense value)
comparative_notes: 攻撃力 (kougeki-ryoku) is the antonym in stat contexts. 耐久力 (resilience) covers a different concept — durability/toughness rather than active defense.

examples.japanese: {敵|てき}の{攻|こう}{撃|げき}{力|りょく}が{自|じ}{分|ぶん}の{防|ぼう}{御|ぎょ}を{上|うわ}{回|まわ}る。
examples.english: The enemy's attack power exceeds my defense.

cross_references.note: 攻撃力 — attack power (the opposing stat)
耐久力 — resilience (durability, distinct from defense)
